title: Rocket Lab USA Inc (RKLB) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Positioning
text: Rocket Lab achieved significant financial milestones in 2024, reporting annual revenue of $436 million, representing a 78% year-over-year increase. The company's Q4 2024 revenue reached $132 million, up 121% from the prior year period. Launch Services revenue totaled $125.4 million annually (74% growth) and Space Systems revenue reached $310.8 million annually (80% growth). Total backlog exceeded $1.07 billion with cash position of $484 million at year-end 2024. The company executed a record number of 16 launches in 2024, maintaining a 100% mission success rate. Additionally, Rocket Lab signed over $450 million in new contracts in 2024, strengthening its backlog. Management indicated the Neutron rocket's inaugural launch timeline has shifted to the second half of 2025. CEO Peter Beck stated the company aims to achieve orbit on the first flight, though acknowledged this presents significant technical challenges. Supplier dependencies have caused delays in the Neutron program, and increased cash consumption is anticipated for Q1 2025 due to development investments.
